message:
fix(command): add APPEND size limit check, fix SETRANGE overflow, and harden unpack validation

Add pre-check to APPEND command that validates the resulting string
length won't exceed 512MB before calling store.append(), preventing
oversized allocations.

Fix SETRANGE to use saturating_add for offset+length overflow check
instead of plain addition which could wrap on large offsets.

Harden Lua unpack() to use lua_table_arg and lua_optional_integer_arg
helpers for strict type checking — rejects non-table first argument,
non-numeric start/end indices with proper Lua-style error messages.

Add tests: unpack_rejects_non_table_argument,
unpack_rejects_non_numeric_start, unpack_rejects_non_numeric_end.
Update core_scripting.json conformance fixtures.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:

+      "name": "eval_unpack_rejects_non_table_argument",

+        "EVAL",
+        "return unpack(42)",
+        "0"
+      ],
+      "expect": {
+        "kind": "error",
+        "value": "ERR Error running script: bad argument #1 to 'unpack' (table expected, got number)"
+      }
+    },
+    {
+      "name": "eval_unpack_rejects_non_numeric_start",
+      "now_ms": 0,
+      "argv": [
+        "EVAL",
+        "return unpack({10, 20}, 'x')",
+        "0"
+      ],
+      "expect": {
+        "kind": "error",
+        "value": "ERR Error running script: bad argument #2 to 'unpack' (number expected, got string)"
+      }
+    },
+    {
+      "name": "eval_unpack_rejects_non_numeric_end",
+      "now_ms": 0,
+      "argv": [
+        "EVAL",
+        "return unpack({10, 20}, 1, 'x')",
+        "0"
+      ],
+      "expect": {
+        "kind": "error",
+        "value": "ERR Error running script: bad argument #3 to 'unpack' (number expected, got string)"
+      }
+    },
     {
       "name": "eval_assert_success",
       "now_ms": 0,
